## ✅ Checklist

<!-- Make sure all of these are checked before requesting a review -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and fixed all TypeScript errors
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated the `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have added or updated comments for complex logic
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any new console errors or warnings
- [ ] I have not committed any `.env` files or secrets
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if my change affects setup or usage

## 🔒 Security Considerations

<!-- Does this PR have any security implications? -->

- [ ] This PR does not affect authentication or authorization
- [ ] This PR does not expose any sensitive student data
- [ ] This PR does not introduce new environment variables (or I've updated `.env.example`)
